item.title: And I KNOW imma get comments so ill preempt them: #notallmilitarymembers end up doing what thier govt wants them to do, rascist ...
item.description:
And I KNOW imma get comments so ill preempt them: #notallmilitarymembers end up doing what thier govt wants them to do, rascist t*rrorism, but that is in fact the function of the military so if u don’t want to be identified with it, don’t complain in my comments, work to undermine the army ppl mistakenly identify u with.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: You can’t on one hand celebtrade how cool, and vibsey and interesting Israel is while claiming bigotry when we say the opposite
item.description:
You can’t on one hand celebtrade how cool, and vibsey and interesting Israel is while claiming bigotry when we say the opposite.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are SUCH hypocrites, if u wanna stand against antisemitism, I’ll stand arm in arm with you, but that starts with the predom...
item.description:
They are SUCH hypocrites, if u wanna stand against antisemitism, I’ll stand arm in arm with you, but that starts with the predominate and despicable antisemetic ideology of Zionism



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: At this point I’m tired of pointing out that fascist dems are in fact… fascist
item.description:
At this point I’m tired of pointing out that fascist dems are in fact… fascist. But Jesus Christ they keep showing up and being the most annoying ppl ever



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is exactly what birthright is: make jam, justify imperialism
item.description:
This is exactly what birthright is: make jam, justify imperialism. It’s a gross but effective form of normalization and deep propaganda
